{"type": "transform", "code": "df['Pclass'] = pd.to_numeric(df['Pclass'], errors='coerce')
df['SibSp'] = pd.to_numeric(df['SibSp'], errors='coerce')
med = df['Pclass'].median()
shifted_up = df['Pclass'] > med * 5
shifted_dn = df['Pclass'] < med / 5

action_content:
df['Pclass'] = pd.to_numeric(df['Pclass'], errors='coerce')
df['SibSp'] = pd.to_numeric(df['SibSp'], errors='coerce')
med = df['Pclass'].median()
shifted_up = df['Pclass'] > med * 5
shifted_dn = df['Pclass'] < med / 5
df.loc[shifted_up, 'Pclass'] = df.loc[shifted_up, 'Pclass'] / 10
df.loc[shifted_dn, 'Pclass'] = df.loc[shifted_dn, 'Pclass'] * 10
df['Pclass'] = df['Pclass'].fillna(df['Pclass'].median())

response_preview:
{"type": "transform", "code": "df['Parch'] = pd.to_numeric(df['Parch'], errors='coerce')
df['Survived'] = pd.to_numeric(df['Survived'], errors='coerce')

# Identify rows where Parch and Survived seem swapped (e.g., Parch is 0/1 and Survived is 1/0)
mask_swap = ((df['Parch'] == 0) & (df['Survived'] == 1)) | ((df['Parch'] == 1) & (df['Survived'] == 0))

df.loc[mask_swap, ['Parch', 'Survived']] = df.loc[mask_swap, ['Survived', 'Parch']]"}

action_content:
df['Parch'] = pd.to_numeric(df['Parch'], errors='coerce')
df['Survived'] = pd.to_numeric(df['Survived'], errors='coerce')

mask_swap = ((df['Parch'] == 0) & (df['Survived'] == 1)) | ((df['Parch'] == 1) & (df['Survived'] == 0))

df.loc[mask_swap, ['Parch', 'Survived']] = df.loc[mask_swap, ['Survived', 'Parch']]
df['Parch'] = df['Parch'].fillna(df['Parch'].median())
